column1: I'm talking to you. Please, listen to _____.
Who is that man? Why are you looking at _____?
These bags are nice. Do you want to look at _____?
"Do you know those men?" - "Yes, I work with _____".
Where are my books? I can't find _____.
I like that dress. I'm going to buy _____.
We are going to the cinema. You can come with _____.
Where is your sister? I want to talk to _____.
We are listening to music. Tom gave it to _____.
I want to buy this book. Please, show it to _____.
